title: Release timing pressure, allow the right moment
subtitle: A release-and-allow practice for clearing the fear of missing out that makes timing feel stressful.
excerpt: A short energy statement from the MONEY program. The release works with fear of the missed window; the allow opens to trusting that the right timing is available to you.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 48 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when a time-sensitive opportunity has you feeling pressured to decide before you're ready.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 48 of the MONEY program. For when the fear of missing an opportunity is rushing your judgment or making you stall when you should be moving.
I am ready to release all timing pressure, fear of missing the window, and panic around when opportunities should arrive. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow perfect timing for every opportunity that is meant for me. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from Day 48 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
